from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader

env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader("templates"))

def render_email_batch(users: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    results = []
    for user in users:
        template = env.get_template("welcome_email.html")
        html = template.render(
            username=user["name"],
            email=user["email"],
            plan=user["plan"],
        )
        results.append(html)
    return results

def generate_invoices(orders: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    invoices = []
    for order in orders:
        tmpl = env.get_template("invoice.html")
        rendered = tmpl.render(
            order_id=order["id"],
            items=order["items"],
            total=order["total"],
        )
        invoices.append(rendered)
    return invoices

def build_report_pages(data_chunks: list[list[dict]]) -> list[str]:
    pages = []
    for chunk in data_chunks:
        tpl = env.get_template("report_page.html")
        pages.append(tpl.render(rows=chunk))
    return pages
